nodes.label: Asterisk queue agent diagnostics and management
state_interface hint for Asterisk agent state tracking
nodes.rationale: Asterisk uses the extension's hint (state_interface hint:1219@ext-local) to track agent state; without a correct state_interface the agent status (Not in use / In use / Busy / Unavailable) is determined incorrectly and calls may not route.

nodes.label: SIP / PJSIP registration status check
nodes.rationale: An Unavailable agent status usually traces to the device, not the queue entry: sip show peers (chan_sip) or pjsip show endpoints (PJSIP) distinguishes OK vs UNKNOWN vs Unspecified registration states.
